auto.api_doc_permission_retry: Please confirm that the current account still has API document permissions and try again later.
auto.category_header_hint: The category selection is placed in the header, and the list below is only responsible for interface browsing under the current category.
auto.interface_document_return_failed: The current interface document failed to be returned successfully, please refresh and try again.
auto.no_accessible_categories: There is currently no accessible category
auto.no_interfaces_in_current_category: There is currently no interface in the current category
auto.open_interface_from_left: Open the interface you want to view from the interface list on the left.
auto.permission_required_description: The current account lacks the required permissions to access this page.
auto.refresh_or_switch_category: Please refresh and try again, or switch to another category.
auto.select_category_then_display_interfaces: Select the category above and then display the interface
auto.select_category_then_open_interface: First select the category above, and then open the interface you want to view from the interface list on the left.
auto.select_category_to_view_interface_list: Select a category to view the interface list
auto.view_details_after_selecting_interface: View details after selecting the interface
